codeReview.summary: The implementation covers the feature contract: warm save benchmark was added and wired into the saveSession filter, benchmark baseline/results were updated with cold+warm rows and explained regressions, and a bench gate script plus tests enforce the stated regression policy and warm-threshold requirement.

summary: Pass. Feature m5-benchmarks-validation-r2 is implemented as specified in commit 9680c3f, and the reviewed diff/transcript show no blocking or non-blocking defects within this feature scope.
